Bash(python -c "
import PyPDF2
import os

base = r'C:\\Users\\ianbe\\OneDrive\\Custom Programs\\PSAR_OHS_Checklist_Suite\\docs'

for pdf_name in ['Trailer_Safety_Check_Checklist.pdf', 'Annual_PFD_Buoyancy_Check_Checklist.pdf', 'Annual_Technical_Rope_Gear_Check_Checklist.pdf']:
    path = os.path.join\(base, pdf_name\)
    print\(f'===== {pdf_name} ====='\)
    reader = PyPDF2.PdfReader\(path\)
    for i, page in enumerate\(reader.pages\):
        print\(f'--- Page {i+1} ---'\)
        print\(page.extract_text\(\)\)
    print\(\)
")
